free_text: Radiative PI-0   photoproduction  on  protons  in  the
Target cell   (length  4.76  cm)  filled  with  liquid
optically isolated NAI(Tl) crystals, each read out by
an individual photomultiplier tube. The Crystall Ball
covers the  full  azimuthal  range  and a polar-angle
range from 20 to 160 degree, resulting in solid-angle
The target is surrounded by the  cylindrical  Particle
scintillation counters aligned parallel to  the  beam
To extract the incoherent cross section to the
4.4 MeV  state,  the  low-energy photon spectrum for
each theta-PI  bin  was  fitted  with   a   Gaussian
centered at 4.4 MeV plus an exponential background.
Data from Figs.  14 - 16 were compiled at the
Russia MSU SINP CDFE by V. Varlamov.
